title: Mystery Potions
description: Various new potions whose effects vary by world, depending on the world seed
body:
## Mystery Potions

![Banner with potions from Mystery Potions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tfK7Fz9A/images/947cd8ddb16e0ad51ff0ac37c148c48c3f5e1b99.png)

**Mystery Potions** adds a variety of potions with effects whose details vary across different worlds, depending on the world seed - it is impossible to tell exactly what the potion will do until you've tried it the first time! Within a given world, a potion will always have the same effect, for every player, but this effect can be any number of different things depending on the world seed.

### Obtaining
Most potions can be obtained as treasure loot, from fishing, piglin bartering, villager trading, occasional mob drops, or other sources. Additionally, the following potions can be created on demand:

- Swampy Brew - Brew a lily pad into a water bottle
- Flaming Concoction - Brew charcoal into a potion of fire resistance
- Mariner's Mixture - Brew a pufferfish directly into water
- Bottled Time - Brew a clock into awkward potion

"Distilled Emeralds" must be obtained by trading, or as illager loot, and "Floating Blood" must be obtained as loot or by bartering.
